items.title: 1 Button Paragon Power 31.9k
items.rotation:
Spam f1. That's it.

              Opener is To The Limit into Chant of Action (for motivation, read grandmaster trait in paragon) into F1.

              Do note that you want to maintain 7+ stacks of motivation. If you drop motivation try to recast F2 to
              regain motivation.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              Note here is that Unsuspecting Foe crit caps you so take some assassin's pieces/accuracy sigil if you want
              to always be crit capped.

              If you want to min max Unsuspecting Foe you could run Valkyrie pieces and get more vitality since the
              extra precision from Berserker's is unnecessary (make sure you are at 75% crit chance though with fury).
              Up to you.

items.title: 1 Button Paragon Condi 32.7k
items.rotation:
F1 off cooldown. Opener is To The Limit into Chant of Action (for motivation, read grandmaster trait in paragon) into F1.

              If you ever drop below 7 motivation recast F2.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike content.

              You can run full grieving and krait runes for a small damage boost (probably add on like 1k DPS). However if you are a new player and you are building out your first ascended set get viper's instead it is more useful across way more builds.
              extra precision from Berserker's is unnecessary (make sure you are at 75% crit chance though with fury).
              Up to you.

items.title: 1 Button Spellbreaker Power 31.4k
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              Note here is that Unsuspecting Foe crit caps you so take some assassin's pieces/accuracy sigil if you want
              to always be crit capped.

              If you want to min max Unsuspecting Foe you could run Valkyrie pieces and get more vitality since the
              extra precision from Berserker's is unnecessary (make sure you are at 75% crit chance though with fury).
              Up to you.

items.title: 3 Button Paragon Condi 37.4k
items.rotation:
F1 into Sword 3 into Sword 4. Cast after an auto attack. Opener is To The Limit into Chant of Action (for motivation, read grandmaster trait in paragon) into F1.

              You can also finish auto chains for a very small damage boost. However this is a bit 'harder' to do, so it's not necessary.

              If you ever drop below 7 motivation recast F2.

              Make sure to leave sword 4 inside the enemy (don't recast/yank it out).
items.explanation: This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike content.

items.title: 3 Button Berserker Power 34.5k
items.rotation:
Spam F1s + Blood Reckoning. Try not to cancel your auto attack chain. Spam
              Outrage off cooldown.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

items.title: 3 Button Berserker Condi 33.3k
items.rotation:
Spam F1s. Spam Outrage off cooldown for berserk uptime. Cancelling auto chains
              isn't a super big deal.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              I didn't get higher damage with UF because I think your base crit is already high. It's not 100% min maxed
              (we overcap on expertise here) so you can probably push damage a little bit more by swapping in some
              sinister pieces/running condi primary food instead of being cheap like me but it's good enough trust me. I
              could see it pushing 34k.

items.title: 3 Button Bladesworn Power 33.4k
items.rotation: 3 buttons basically. No weapon swap. Cast Dragon Trigger off cooldown.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              You take river's flow to be able to 'afk' generate flow. Technically speaking you don't 'need' it so you
              can get a slightly higher dps number running Unseen Sword but it makes flow generation a lot tighter. I
              would just recommend River's Flow if you are a beginner.

items.title: 4 Button Paragon Alacrity Healer
items.rotation:
Cast "To The Limit!" (heal), "For Great Justice!", F3, F1 off cooldown.

              You output: 25 might, fury, protection, swiftness, regen, alacrity, periodic stability, periodic vigor,
              barrier, strong condi cleanse through F1 F3.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              You will (probably) not be able to solo heal a squad or the build may not work well on more
              threatening/higher damaging scenario. If you play this the overheal from the other healer will be
              assisting you some. Or if people are eating a lot of damage it will also not work well and you have to
              press your skills. In those scenarios Staff 2 Staff 3 Staff 5 are good burst healing skills to press. I
              focused low intensity on providing good boons + sustained healing. Unfortunately healers need to be
              versatile somewhat and adapt to the situation.

              If you are dying, use minstrel's or giver's stats.

              You run Febe relic (swiftness on healing skill) because that's your only source of swiftness for your
              subgroup with 4 buttons and no weapon swap.

              You can take Vigorous Shouts (last trait line tactics) for more raw healing, but you lose stability.

items.title: 5 Button Paragon Power 37.5k
items.rotation:
Rotation is basically f1 - axe 4 - axe 5. Spam Dolyak and Stamina signets off
              cooldown. Precast signets for ferocity buff.

              Opener is To The Limit into Chant of Action (for motivation, read grandmaster trait in paragon) into F1.

              Do note that you want to maintain 7+ stacks of motivation. If you drop motivation try to recast F2 to
              regain motivation.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

items.title: 5 Button Berserker Condi 38k
items.rotation:
This is a priority based rotation. The priority in order is: F1 (Burst) - Blood
              Reckoning into F1 - Sword 4 (Impale) - Sword 3 (Final Thrust). You actually want to cancel auto attack
              chains (casting skills leads to higher damage) so don't finish your auto attack chains and cast skills.
              Basically make the priority decision after completing an auto attack. Spam outrage off cool down for
              berserk uptime.

              MAKE SURE TO LEAVE SWORD 4 INSIDE THE ENEMY. Don't pull it out with recasting sword 4. It applies torment
              while it's inside the enemy.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner warrior build for fractal/raid/strike content.

              I realized in this video I had a dragon's offhand sword instead of a vipers sword. With vipers this
              achieved ~38.2k. Not that much different but a slight increase.

              I was min-maxing a bit there. You don't need the two sinister pieces; full viper's is fine, you will just
              overcap on expertise a little bit.

items.title: 5 Button Spellbreaker Power 37.7k
items.rotation:
Rotation is basically f1 - axe 4 - axe 5. Spam Dolyak and Stamina signets off
              cooldown. Precast signets for ferocity buff.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity warrior build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              Do note that you crit cap with Unsuspecting Foe. If you want to crit cap always you can swap to assassins
              rings and accuracy sigil instead of impact. This will result in slightly lower damage.

              If you want to min max Unsuspecting Foe you could run Valkyrie pieces and get more vitality since the
              extra precision from Berserker's is unnecessary. Up to you.

              I tried out signet of fury but I didn't see a significant DPS difference. I decided not to run it because
              it has a small cast time vs the other signets I spam here. I wanted to make it really easy to play and
              signet cast time may screw something up.

              I don't like kick because it requires the player to look at peak performance uptime and kick has more
              animation locks. I feel like it's not 'beginner' enough. I wanted to make it 'smooth' to the feel.

items.title: 6 Button Berserker Power 39.1k
items.rotation:
This is a priority based rotation. The priority in order is: F1 (Burst) - Blood
              Reckoning into F1 - GS 2 (Hundred Blades) - GS 4 (Bladetrail) - GS 5 (Rush). You make a decision on what
              to cast between auto attack chains. Do not cancel auto attack chains. Spam outrage off cool down for
              berserk uptime.

              Example: auto attack chain into F1 into GS 2 into GS 4 into auto attack chain. An auto attack chain is 3
              hits on the greatsword (GS 1).
items.explanation:
This is a beginner warrior build for fractal/raid/strike content.

              Looking back over it I made a few minor mistakes I think 39.5k+ is possible if you play it well.
